revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-075

A light put into service in emergency when the permanent or stand-by light has failed.

It often provides a reduced service in comparison with the permanent light.

{{IALAFooter}}
